content.thinking: Let me start by understanding the current state of the cluster and the ingress configuration.

content.text: I'll start by inspecting the current state of the ingress and backend deployments in the demo namespace.

input.description: Get all ingress resources in demo namespace
Get deployments, services, and pods in demo namespace
